idea: promote all tensor maps to L2_256B
justification: Bounded ncu shows active DRAM traffic with low tensor utilization and substantial shared-memory bank-conflict pressure; nearby tiny-M winners improved by maximizing tensor-map residency in L2, which can reduce refill pressure on the shared staging path.

Iter001 improved with L2 promotion but bottleneck remains smem_throughput; the best completed 4096x4096x4096 neighbor improved by reducing WARP_N from 256 to 128, which cuts rhs staging pressure and bank-conflict exposure for smaller M while keeping the current best kernel as the hill-climb base.
